quotes.text: I want the simplest possible thing that satisfies my actual requirements, and I want to understand every single line of it.
quotes.author: Jonathan Blow
quotes.source: Preventing the Collapse of Civilization, DevGAMM 2019

quotes.text: Each layer of abstraction is a layer of bugs, a layer of performance problems, and a layer of things you don't understand.
quotes.author: Jonathan Blow
quotes.source: Preventing the Collapse of Civilization, DevGAMM 2019

quotes.text: You can't refactor what you can't read. You can't read what you can't understand. Start there.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The best engineers are the ones who can debug without looking at the code. They understand the system, not just the syntax.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to close a deal is to understand the customer's problem better than they do.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to understand your customer is to become your customer. Use your own product.
quotes.author: based
